text:
Fair Value Gaps (FVGs) are best used when price is expanding in a particular direction. 

The ideal way is to wait for price to take out liquidity in or around a HTF FVG thereby validating it, then dropping down to a LTF to get a clean entry. 

#forex #forextrading #forextrader #forexeducation #fairvaluegap

text:
Protecting an asset doesn't end when you buy. It continues with keeping your records and documents up to date.

Some families use living trusts as part of their broader estate planning. If ownership of a property changes, it's worth reviewing related documents, including insurance, to make sure everything stays consistent.

Small details today can help prevent bigger headaches tomorrow.

What financial lesson do you wish you had learned sooner?
Share your thoughts below

text:
Most people think becoming wealthy is about discipline and routine.
It's not.
The people who actually build extraordinary wealth become emotionally consumed by a vision.
They can't stop thinking about it. Talking about it. Visualizing it.
That obsession is energy. And when you learn to direct it toward one identity, one future reality, everything changes.
Because your reality follows your dominant frequency.
Obsess over lack and your nervous system recreates survival.
Obsess over the version of you who already has it and eventually your brain stops treating it like fantasy.
✨ Follow @pagetkagy for more on manifestation, success and quantum energetics.
#manifestation #quantummanifestation #quantumleaping #spiritualawakening #consciousness #abundance #lawofattraction #selfgrowthjourney

text:
Building wealth isn't just about how much money you make. It's about understanding how money is managed.

Many high-net-worth individuals focus on asset allocation, legal structures, and long-term planning instead of letting cash sit idle.

The more you learn about how money works, the more informed your financial decisions become.

Financial education is one of the few investments that can pay dividends for a lifetime.

Motivation that pushes you into the luxury lane 🚀

text:
The rich don’t just earn differently. They think differently.

Their rule is simple. Never use earned income to buy luxuries. They take their active income and turn it into assets. Property, businesses, stocks. Then they use the income those assets generate to fund the lifestyle. The car paid for by the portfolio. The holiday paid for by the rental income. The poor earn and spend. The wealthy earn, invest, then spend the returns. Your income is a seed. Do you eat it or plant it?

Plant the seed and live off the harvest.

#TanimZaman #Wealth #Money #Finance #Investment
